title: Forward Deployed Engineer
description: Responsibilities: Work directly with strategic enterprise customers to design, implement, and deploy production AI systems. Own technical decisions through customer deployment. Key requirements: Python, solution architecture, customer deployment, technical ownership, and comfort with ambiguous agentic workflows.

title: Technical Program Manager, AI Infrastructure
description: Responsibilities: Drive cross-functional execution for AI infrastructure programs. Coordinate model deployment launches across research, product, and engineering. Key requirements: AI infrastructure, roadmap coordination, launch management, and stakeholder management.

title: Applied AI Engineer
description: Responsibilities: Build applied machine learning products for real users. Improve model integration and production AI systems. Key requirements: LLMs, evaluation pipelines, Python, model integration, and production systems.

title: Solutions Engineer, AI
description: Responsibilities: Partner with enterprise customers on AI implementation and technical discovery. Design solution architecture for production data and AI workflows. Key requirements: RAG systems, solution architecture, enterprise implementation, and customer-facing technical communication.

title: AI Field Engineer
description: Responsibilities: Own customer deployment for production AI workflows. Guide enterprise implementation and evaluation systems. Key requirements: Python, stakeholder management, production AI workflows, and customer deployment experience.

title: Developer Relations Engineer, AI Agents
description: Responsibilities: Create technical content, demos, and reference applications. Work closely with users and product engineering. Key requirements: agents, RAG, evaluation, LLM app development, and user-facing technical communication.

title: Product Engineer, AI
description: Responsibilities: Build AI-native developer tools for software teams. Improve product workflows powered by LLMs. Key requirements: model integration, product intuition, Python, TypeScript, and production systems.

title: GTM Engineer, AI
description: Responsibilities: Bridge sales, product, and engineering for enterprise AI customers. Build prototypes and guide implementation. Key requirements: customer requirements discovery, enterprise AI workflows, prototyping, and product feedback translation.

title: Engineering Program Manager, AI Search
description: Responsibilities: Lead cross-functional execution for AI search launches. Coordinate engineering operations across product and infrastructure teams. Key requirements: roadmap planning, stakeholder management, AI search, and launch management.

title: People Operations Coordinator
description: Responsibilities: Coordinate people operations programs, scheduling, onboarding, and internal process documentation. Key requirements: operations coordination, process documentation, and scheduling.
